Welcome to the Sample Page

Section One: Introduction

This is the first paragraph of the sample article. It contains enough text to ensure that the chunker produces at least one meaningful chunk.

The second paragraph provides additional context about the test document. It is important that this text is correctly extracted.

Section Two: Details

Here are some important details about the RAG-CRM system:

  • Hybrid search combining vector and keyword retrieval
  • Multi-format ingestion pipeline
  • Automatic wiki generation
